title: Agent Teams Orchestration Contract
description: Defines parallel execution rules for Agent Teams within the Garage pipeline. This contract supplements orchestration_contract.json — it does NOT replace it.

subagent_parallel.description: Spawn isolated subagents within Worker Stage 5 for independent file changes

independence_check.description: MANDATORY check before any parallel dispatch. All four conditions must pass.

conditions.name: different_directories
conditions.check: Target files must be in different directory paths
conditions.failure_action: Group co-located files into same subagent

conditions.name: no_cross_imports
conditions.check: No target file imports or references another target file
conditions.failure_action: Process dependent files sequentially in single subagent

conditions.name: no_shared_state
conditions.check: No two target files mutate the same configuration, state, or shared resource

conditions.name: no_ordering_dependency
conditions.check: No target file depends on the output of another target file

lifecycle.2_check_independence: Lead agent runs IC-1 through IC-4 on all target files
lifecycle.3_group_files: Independent files grouped into subagent batches (max 5 batches)
lifecycle.4_spawn_subagents: Each batch dispatched to subagent with worktree isolation
lifecycle.5_execute: Subagents execute in parallel, each in isolated worktree
lifecycle.6_collect: Lead agent collects subagent outputs (modified files + logs)
lifecycle.7_merge: Worktree changes merged back to working branch
lifecycle.8_handoff: Combined output handed to Stage 6 (Artifact Writer) as normal

failure_handling.any_subagent_fails: All subagents halted. Lead agent collects all error reports.
failure_handling.scope_violation: Subagent halts immediately. Lead agent reports violation.
failure_handling.merge_conflict: Should not occur if independence check passed. If it does, treat as IC failure — fall back to sequential.

fleet_refit_parallel.description: Spawn independent Claude instances to apply same WORK_PACKET to multiple child repos simultaneously

dispatch_rules.repo_resolution: Each target repo resolved from FLEET_REGISTRY.yaml

lifecycle.1_read_refit: Refit Coordinator reads WORK_PACKET with execution_type=fleet_refit
lifecycle.3_spawn_teammates: One teammate spawned per target repo (max 5)
lifecycle.4_execute_per_repo: Each teammate runs Stages 3-5 independently (mount → validate → execute)
lifecycle.5_collect_bundles: Coordinator collects artifact bundles from all teammates

failure_handling.teammate_fails: Failure isolated to that repo. Other teammates continue.
failure_handling.partial_fleet_success: Repos that pass are certified independently. Failed repos reported for manual review.

invariants: The sequential stage pipeline (1-10) is NOT modified. Parallelism occurs WITHIN stages only.
Independence check is MANDATORY before any parallel dispatch. No exceptions.
Subagents inherit parent WORK_PACKET scope — they cannot expand it.
Each subagent PID is scoped under the parent WORK_PACKET PID.
Worktree isolation is the ONLY permitted isolation mechanism for subagents.
Human remains sovereign at all decision points. Parallelism does not bypass human gates.
If independence cannot be proven, execution falls back to sequential. Sequential is always safe.
